steps.title: Multiply the cross terms and constant
steps.content: The cross terms are $$\frac{2}{7}x\cdot(-7)=-2x$$ and $$\frac{8}{5}\cdot5x=8x.$$ Together they make $6x$. The constant term is $$\frac{8}{5}\cdot(-7)=-\frac{56}{5}.$$

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: Therefore $$g(x)h(x)=\frac{10}{7}x^2+6x-\frac{56}{5},$$ which matches choice D. Choice D is correct. The cross terms are the key check because they produce the middle term $6x$.
